testcase.name: test_fit_request_endpoint_requires_auth
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_34.py:174: in test_fit_request_endpoint_requires_auth assert response.status_code in [401, 422], f"Expected 401 or 422, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 401 or 422, got 200: {"message":"Fitness request submitted successfully","request_id":"FIT-20260120-12CBCE","ticket_id":"TKT-CF7A2004"} E assert 200 in [401, 422] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_advisory_request_endpoint_requires_auth
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_34.py:220: in test_advisory_request_endpoint_requires_auth assert response.status_code in [401, 422], f"Expected 401 or 422, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 401 or 422, got 200: {"message":"Advisory request submitted successfully. Our expert team will contact you within 24 hours.","request_id":"ADV-20260120-623606","ticket_id":"TKT-25769468"} E assert 200 in [401, 422] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
